title: 8 bit random number generator with timer
subtitle: Redstone Device Map

title: Reliable Dropper Elevator

subtitle: Redstone Device Map
description: I came up with this design while working on a binary-to-decimal decoder. In binary-coded decimal (BCD) the numbers 0-9 are represented in binary 0000 through 1001, with 1010-1111 (A-F) being invalid. When an invalid number is encountered, 0110 (6) is added to make it it tick back over to the correct decimal value. For example, 0111 (7) + 0110 (6) = 1101 (D). 1101 + 0110 = 0011 (3). title: Lockable Door
subtitle: Redstone Device Map
description: This is a door that I've been working on today. It has 2 switches, one on the outside that opens and closes the door, and one on the inside, which overrides the other switch. This means that if the indoor switch is on, the door stays closed, even if the outdoor switch says to open it. However, if the indoor switch is off, the outdoor switch will work properly. Hope you enjoy!

The tank is also known by the name of 천리마 전차 (千里馬 or the "Chollima Tank"). The original Ch'ŏnma-ho is based on the Soviet T-62. title: Redstone Escalator
subtitle: Redstone Device Map
description: This is a redstone escalator I designed after watching a video on Youtube. My brother helped me with ituntil I finished it. The concept is that first you get pushed up by a piston, then to the side by another piston. This pattern continues until you get to your destination. Th bottom pistons start at 1 tick and skip by twos. The top pistons start at two and skip by twos. This is so that the pattern can go like this: bottom, top, bottom, top, bottom, top, etc.

subtitle: 3D Art Map
description: This is a re-creation of Jessie's Tree house from the beginning of Minecraft: Story Mode.One thing I found out quickly while re-creating this set is that the camera in Minecraft: Story Mode compresses space. So while it might seem tight and small, the actual environment when built out block for block is actually quite open. This is likely due to the fact that these are sets for 3D "actors" to interact in, and the camera needs to be able to get around them and find the right angle.

title: More compact full-auto melon farm
subtitle: Redstone Device Map
description: ﻿Hello :DBack with another redstone device. This one is also a fully automated melon farm! only this time it's more compact! It also produces more melon slices because it has 6 stems. My previous version only has 2 stems.how does it workAbove every 'potential' melon there's an observer. When a melon grows that observer feeds it's signal to a monostable circuit and powers a piston that breaks the melon and pushes the slices into the water stream! There are 6 of these components, each for one stem
cleaned_text: A compact fully automatic melon farm with 6 stems, observers, pistons, and water stream collection.

title: 8 bit CCA Based program counter, does branching
subtitle: Redstone Device Map
description: Hey ^_^I was watching a video of Bennyscube a while back, on how to build a Carry Cancel Adder (CCA). I thought 'I could make a counter out of this' since it's a really fast type of adder. Went building and came up with this.What does it doIt counts in 8 bit binary numbers, and has the ability to 'jump' immediately to a given number at any time while running. This device can be useful when you want a computer to compare values and based on the comparison result jump to other lines in a program.
cleaned_text: An 8-bit redstone program counter with branching capability using a Carry Cancel Adder design.
aug_1: An 8-bit redstone program counter featuring branching capability built with a Carry Cancel Adder design

title: Seismic Vibrator
subtitle: Land Structure Map
description: Hello,this is a machine used in seismic data aquisition. The shaker in the middle of the vehicle injects low-frequency vibrations into the ground which get reflected by the various subsurface layers of the earth. A wide-spread field of sensors detect the reflected seismic waves on the surface. With the received data an image of what the underground should look like can be generated.This method often is used to find oil, gas, water or other minerals such as salt underground.Enjoy!
cleaned_text: A seismic vibrator truck used for geophysical data acquisition with a shaker and sensors.
